testsuite.name: fr.oc.devops.backend.services.NotionServiceTest

testcase.name: createNotion()

failure.message:
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: Mockito cannot mock this class: interface fr.oc.devops.backend.repositories.NotionRepository.
If you're not sure why you're getting this error, please open an issue on GitHub.
Java : 25 JVM vendor name : Ubuntu JVM vendor version : 25.0.2+10-Ubuntu-124.04 JVM name : OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM JVM version : 25.0.2+10-Ubuntu-124.04 JVM info : mixed mode OS name : Linux OS version : 6.6.87.2-microsoft-standard-WSL2
You are seeing this disclaimer because Mockito is configured to create inlined mocks. You can learn about inline mocks and their limitations under item #39 of the Mockito class javadoc.
Underlying exception : org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: Could not modify all classes [interface fr.oc.devops.backend.repositories.NotionRepository, interface org.springframework.data.repository.Repository, interface org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository]

type hierarchy
This problem should never occur for javac-compiled classes. This problem has been observed for classes that are: - Compiled by older versions of scalac - Classes that are part of the Android distribution at testsuite.system-out:
20:39:58.547 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [fr.oc.devops.backend.services.NotionServiceTest]: NotionServiceTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 20:39:59.184 [Test worker] WARN org.springframework.test.context.TestContextManager -- Caught exception while allowing TestExecutionListener [org.springframework.boot.test.mock.mockito.MockitoTestExecutionListener] to prepare test instance [fr.oc.devops.backend.services.NotionServiceTest@6fca5907] org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: Mockito cannot mock this class: interface fr.oc.devops.backend.repositories.NotionRepository.
If you're not sure why you're getting this error, please open an issue on GitHub.
Java : 25 JVM vendor name : Ubuntu JVM vendor version : 25.0.2+10-Ubuntu-124.04 JVM name : OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM JVM version : 25.0.2+10-Ubuntu-124.04 JVM info : mixed mode OS name : Linux OS version : 6.6.87.2-microsoft-standard-WSL2
You are seeing this disclaimer because Mockito is configured to create inlined mocks. You can learn about inline mocks and their limitations under item #39 of the Mockito class javadoc.
